global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent headline and call to action.
global.main_message: The ad promotes earning cashback with a simple signup process.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white text headline that reads 'Earn cashback daily' is prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline that states 'Fast signup, instant card' adds context.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Get offer' encourages user interaction, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Shape element
elements.description: An abstract shape, possibly a rectangle or oval, is displayed in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar to the previous one, is layered over the background.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape that complements the other elements, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A decorative shape that enhances the overall design, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small abstract shape that adds to the visual complexity of the ad.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' is displayed at the top left, featuring a simple and modern design.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fasteic ard Get offer

elements.label: Additional logo element
elements.description: A small logo or icon that may represent the brand, positioned at the top.
